title: Prado et al_bulk RNA seq mouse experiments
author: Prado, Kris
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: RNA-seq analysis of BBN treated mice was performed using the  rnaseq  pipeline (ver. 1.2) from the nf-core community, a nextflow collection of curated bioinformatic pipelines. Briefly, sequencing quality was assessed using FastQC (ver. 0.11.8). TrimGalore (v.0.5.0) was used for adapter removal, and Cutadapt (ver. 1.18) with default parameters was used for low-quality trimming. Trimmed reads were mapped to the M. musculus genome mm10 (GRC38) using STAR (ver. 2.6). Genes were quantified using Salmon (ver. 1.2.0).  gene_id prefixes correspond to treatment groups: C = control, B = BBN, E = erlotinib, T = trametinib.

Genes were quantified using Salmon (ver. 1.2.0).  gene_id prefixes correspond to treatment groups: C = control, B = BBN, E = erlotinib, T = trametinib.
